name: Zeni
tagline: #1 AI bookkeeping software with automated accounting and human verification
description: Zeni is an AI bookkeeping platform that automates bookkeeping, accounting, and reporting while keeping human verification at the core. It offers personalized support managing all areas of business finances, helps reduce costs, and streamlines vendor payments with AI-powered invoice processing. The platform provides a single dashboard for all financial insights.
cons: Higher price point for small businesses
